text: I am wandering through these dimly-lit, modern spaces—a corridor lined with glass and neon light, an abstract wall marked "R+D." There is an aura of purpose here, yet it feels empty and strangely disorienting, as if I'm lost in someone else's vision of innovation. The cold, clinical glow and the absence of people make me feel isolated and reflective about progress—how it often seems closer to an idea than a lived experience in such vacant rooms.
